puzzle.title: From the Depths of the Well
puzzle.intro: A young soul's journey began with a powerful vision of celestial bodies bowing in reverence. This individual's life was marked by the deepest betrayal from those closest, followed by years of enslavement and wrongful imprisonment. Yet through unwavering faith and divine guidance, this figure rose from the lowest pit to become one of the most powerful people in a great empire. Can you uncover the identity of this remarkable servant of Allah?
clues: I was shown a vision of eleven stars, the sun, and the moon prostrating before me
I was the deeply beloved child of my parent, which bred jealousy among my brothers
I was seized by my own brothers, stripped of my garment, and cast into a deep, dark well
I was sold as a commodity in a marketplace and carried far from my homeland
A powerful woman attempted to compromise my honor, and I was thrown into prison for refusing her advances
I was blessed with the gift of dream interpretation, and rose from a forgotten prisoner to the chief minister of Egypt

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Yusuf
Prophet Musa
Prophet Dawud
Prophet Ayyub
Prophet Sulayman

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Cast into a deep well by one's own brothers
Surviving a great worldwide flood
Being thrown into a blazing furnace
Battling a giant warrior on a battlefield
Being swallowed by a great fish
trial.answer: Cast into a deep well by one's own brothers

location.label: Key Element
options: A deep, dry well in the wilderness
A great wooden ark atop a mountain
A staff that transformed into a serpent
A magnificent throne of great splendor
A sling and five smooth stones
location.answer: A deep, dry well in the wilderness

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Rose to chief minister of Egypt and reunited with beloved family
Built a great ship and called people to faith
Led an entire nation out of bondage in Egypt
Was granted a kingdom and dominion over the unseen
Was given patience through severe illness and healed
outcome.answer: Rose to chief minister of Egypt and reunited with beloved family

puzzle.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَكُمْ يُوسُفُ مِن قَبْلُ بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ فَمَا زِلْتُمْ فِى شَكٍّۢ مِّمَّا جَآءَكُم بِهِۦ ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا هَلَكَ قُلْتُمْ لَن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ رَسُولًۭا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَنْ هُوَ مُسْرِفٌۭ مُّرْتَابٌ
puzzle.verse: And Joseph had already come to you before with clear proofs, but you remained in doubt of that which he brought to you, until when he died, you said, 'Never will Allāh send a messenger after him.' Thus does Allāh leave astray he who is a transgressor and skeptic." (40:34)
